description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image as the default and defining two stages: test and production. Add a test job that runs in the test stage and executes `npm install` followed by `./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng test --watch=false`. Add a production job that runs in the production stage, uses the ruby:latest image, only runs on the master branch, and runs `apt-get update -qy`, `apt-get install -y ruby-dev`, `gem install dpl`, and `dpl --provider=heroku --app=angular-mp --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY` to deploy to Heroku, referencing the HEROKU_API_KEY secret.
